response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack development experience with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React, and has worked on projects that involve complex systems and integrations. Their experience aligns well with the job requirements.
strengths: Proficient in required technologies like TypeScript and Node.js
Experience with complex systems and integrations
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some experience with non-relevant technologies like DLang and Ember.js
No direct mention of AI agent development experience
